generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you hear about the latest civil defense budget cuts? While politicians debate, our communities are left vulnerable. Remember the 2023 Midwest blackouts? Imagine if that happened now - no coordinated response, no local shelters ready. We can't afford to wait while bureaucrats dither. Time to demand real preparedness funding before it's too late. #CivilDefenseMatters #SafetyFirst
